# Clarksville Austin Homes

> Buyer and seller guide to Clarksville, the historic neighborhood in Austin, Texas (ZIP 78703), with live MLS listings and original local expertise. Curated by Luke Allen, a licensed Texas REALTOR (TREC #788149) with Austin Marketing + Development Group. This is Clarksville in Austin, Texas, not Clarksville, Tennessee.

## Listings
- [Clarksville homes for sale](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-homes-for-sale): Every active for-sale listing inside the Clarksville boundary, server-rendered.
- [Clarksville condos for sale](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-condos-for-sale): Condominium listings, from boutique new construction to established communities.
- [Clarksville luxury homes](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-luxury-homes): The $2M-plus tier of infill, estates, and signature new builds.
- [Clarksville new construction](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-new-construction): New condos and modern infill, including The Belvedere and Westline.

## Neighborhood guides
- [Neighborhood guide](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/neighborhood): Complete overview of Clarksville, Austin (78703).
- [History of Clarksville](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-history): Founded in 1871 by freedman Charles Clark; a National Register historic district since 1976.
- [Architecture and landmark rules](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-architecture): Bungalows, cottages, infill, and the difference between local landmark and National Register status.
- [Restaurants and West Lynn dining](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-restaurants): Jeffrey's, Josephine House, Cipollina, Clark's Oyster Bar, and the walkable corridor.
- [Schools](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-schools): Austin ISD feeder led by top-ranked Mathews Elementary.
- [Condo buildings](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-condos): Building-by-building guide to The Belvedere, Westline, Colorfield, de Saligny, and more.

## Market data
- [Market report](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-market-report): Dated, sourced Clarksville home values; single-family median around $1.6M (trailing 12 months), with figures named by source and date.

## Comparisons
- [Clarksville vs Tarrytown](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-vs-tarrytown)
- [Clarksville vs Old Enfield](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-vs-old-enfield)
- [Clarksville vs Pemberton Heights](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/clarksville-vs-pemberton-heights)

- [Sell your Clarksville home](https://www.clarksvilleaustinhomes.com/sell-your-clarksville-home): Hyperlocal home valuation.
